packageRules.description: Upstream images are deliberately pinned to MINOR tags (server:5.15, salt-rim:4.15, meilisearch:v1.15) that float on PATCH automatically (see bar-assistant/CLAUDE.md 'Versioning'). Surface minor/major moves as PRs for the maintainer to review -- because each also requires a coupled bump of the 5-part add-on version + Dockerfile LABEL, which no bot can do unattended.
prBodyNotes: :warning: This bumps an upstream MINOR/MAJOR tag. Before merging, update the coupled fields per bar-assistant/CLAUDE.md 'Versioning': `config.yaml` `version:`, the Dockerfile `io.hass.version` LABEL, and confirm `scripts/check-version-sync.sh` passes.

packageRules.description: Patch float happens via the minor tag at build time; do not open patch PRs for the pinned upstream tags.

customManagers.description: Track the ARG BUILD_FROM default tag (the dockerfile manager only reads FROM lines, not ARG defaults).

Track the version-pinned CI runner images (both amd64 `ubuntu-24.04` and arm64 `ubuntu-24.04-arm`). The github-runners manager only reads literal `runs-on:` values, not labels carried in `strategy.matrix` and referenced via `runs-on: ${{ matrix.runner }}`, so the pins are matched here instead. Docker versioning keeps each on its own stream (the `-arm` variant upgrades to `-arm`, the plain one to plain).
